productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Check Skirt Grey Skirts
description: Composition Grey long skirt with black and blue checks, made of 70% viscose and 30% lana wool, with a 100% acetate lining, with a comfortable waist, and has a zippered and button closure on the right side Fitting Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Don that chic look this winter with this long skirt from united colors of benetton. Pair this with heeled sandals and a fancy top for casual outings, while you can also team it with a formal top and jacket to turn it into an office wear. Model statistics The model wears size M in dresses Height-5.8'',Waist 26"
